goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'north' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'indian' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '17:30' on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'postcode'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the north and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should serve indian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 17:30 on wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get attraction type and postcode
